experiments.name: route_power_and_scope_probe
experiments.hypothesis: The candidate activates on enough routed trigger rows and stays quiet on no-fire rows.
experiments.falsifier: A scoped preflight falsifies the candidate if it misses trigger coverage or activates outside its route.
experiments.stop_rule: Stop before expensive model calls if trigger power or scope safety fails.
experiments.pass_rule: readiness == ready_for_fresh_ablation
experiments.type_i_control: Preflight is a routing gate only; it cannot promote a candidate.

experiments.name: trigger_benefit_sequential
experiments.hypothesis: On routed trigger rows, forcing the candidate improves answer quality over the parent/baseline.
experiments.falsifier: Reject if fresh trigger judgments do not clear the lower-confidence benefit gate.
experiments.measurement: win/tie/loss utility and trigger_lcb90 on judged trigger rows
experiments.stop_rule: Evaluate until min_trigger_judgments is met or the candidate is rejected by benefit.
experiments.pass_rule: trigger_lcb90 >= acceptance threshold and min_trigger_judgments is satisfied
experiments.fail_rule: trigger_lcb90 below threshold, or insufficient judgments after the budget is exhausted
experiments.type_i_control: Sequential lower-bound gate; no graph mutation from raw win count alone.

experiments.name: control_harm_sequential
experiments.hypothesis: On routed controls/no-fire rows, the candidate does not introduce regression harm.
experiments.falsifier: Reject or narrow scope if control loss upper bound exceeds the harm gate.
experiments.stop_rule: Run after trigger benefit is testable; stop immediately on high-confidence control harm.
experiments.pass_rule: control_loss_ucb90 is absent or <= acceptance threshold
experiments.type_i_control: Separate control-harm upper-bound gate prevents trigger-only overfitting.

experiments.name: placebo_context_control
experiments.hypothesis: The observed gain comes from the candidate assumption, not from longer or more salient prompt context.
experiments.falsifier: Compare against a length-matched placebo context on the same routed rows.
experiments.measurement: candidate-vs-placebo pairwise judgments on routed trigger/control rows
experiments.stop_rule: Run only after preflight passes and before accepting high-impact candidates.
experiments.pass_rule: candidate beats length-matched placebo on trigger rows without extra control harm
experiments.fail_rule: placebo matches or beats candidate, indicating exemplar/context boost rather than a valid assumption
experiments.type_i_control: Placebo split guards against selection bias and generic-context boost.

experiments.name: fresh_cross_judge_replay
experiments.hypothesis: The candidate survives fresh-row and judge-direction replay, not just cached or one-sided scoring.
experiments.falsifier: Replay candidate-vs-baseline and baseline-vs-candidate judgments on fresh routed rows.
experiments.stop_rule: Stop after accepted/rejected decision is produced for the proposal id.
experiments.pass_rule: candidate decision == accept after trigger/control gates
experiments.type_i_control: Bidirectional fresh replay reduces cached signal, side bias, and single-judge style preference.

ordered_checks.detail: Trigger coverage is sufficient for fresh ablation.

ordered_checks.name: fresh_ablation_acceptance
ordered_checks.detail: Trigger benefit passed and control harm stayed within gate.

experiments.name: route_power_and_scope_probe
experiments.hypothesis: The candidate activates on enough routed trigger rows and stays quiet on no-fire rows.
experiments.falsifier: A scoped preflight falsifies the candidate if it misses trigger coverage or activates outside its route.
experiments.stop_rule: Stop before expensive model calls if trigger power or scope safety fails.
experiments.pass_rule: readiness == ready_for_fresh_ablation
experiments.type_i_control: Preflight is a routing gate only; it cannot promote a candidate.

experiments.name: trigger_benefit_sequential
experiments.hypothesis: On routed trigger rows, forcing the candidate improves answer quality over the parent/baseline.
experiments.falsifier: Reject if fresh trigger judgments do not clear the lower-confidence benefit gate.
experiments.measurement: win/tie/loss utility and trigger_lcb90 on judged trigger rows
experiments.stop_rule: Evaluate until min_trigger_judgments is met or the candidate is rejected by benefit.
experiments.pass_rule: trigger_lcb90 >= acceptance threshold and min_trigger_judgments is satisfied
experiments.fail_rule: trigger_lcb90 below threshold, or insufficient judgments after the budget is exhausted
experiments.type_i_control: Sequential lower-bound gate; no graph mutation from raw win count alone.

experiments.name: control_harm_sequential
experiments.hypothesis: On routed controls/no-fire rows, the candidate does not introduce regression harm.
experiments.falsifier: Reject or narrow scope if control loss upper bound exceeds the harm gate.
experiments.stop_rule: Run after trigger benefit is testable; stop immediately on high-confidence control harm.
experiments.pass_rule: control_loss_ucb90 is absent or <= acceptance threshold
experiments.type_i_control: Separate control-harm upper-bound gate prevents trigger-only overfitting.

experiments.name: placebo_context_control
experiments.hypothesis: The observed gain comes from the candidate assumption, not from longer or more salient prompt context.
experiments.falsifier: Compare against a length-matched placebo context on the same routed rows.
experiments.command_hint: python3 "phase one/scripts/validation/phase2_v20_framework.py" --variant proposal_ready_combo_se_hard_policy_next --sample "proposal_samples/proposal_se_mh_sample.json" --assumption-graph "phase four/assumption_graph" --assumption-proposals "phase four/assumption_graph/proposals_phase2_v20_gpt55_21_50.json" --assumption-force-proposal-route --assumption-force-proposal-domains software_engineering --assumption-force-proposal-difficulties hard --assumption-graph-skip-domains "" --assumption-placebo-context length_matched
experiments.measurement: candidate-vs-placebo pairwise judgments on routed trigger/control rows
experiments.stop_rule: Run only after preflight passes and before accepting high-impact candidates.
experiments.pass_rule: candidate beats length-matched placebo on trigger rows without extra control harm
experiments.fail_rule: placebo matches or beats candidate, indicating exemplar/context boost rather than a valid assumption
experiments.type_i_control: Placebo split guards against selection bias and generic-context boost.

experiments.name: fresh_cross_judge_replay
experiments.hypothesis: The candidate survives fresh-row and judge-direction replay, not just cached or one-sided scoring.
experiments.falsifier: Replay candidate-vs-baseline and baseline-vs-candidate judgments on fresh routed rows.
experiments.stop_rule: Stop after accepted/rejected decision is produced for the proposal id.
experiments.pass_rule: candidate decision == accept after trigger/control gates
experiments.type_i_control: Bidirectional fresh replay reduces cached signal, side bias, and single-judge style preference.

observed.rationale: Trigger benefit passed and control harm stayed within threshold.

summaries.rationale: Fresh acceptance gate passed after trigger/control checks.
